tasks.title: SPIKE: gitnexus MCP child tool surface investigation
tasks.notes: gitnexus 1.6.7, 13 child tools listed (docs/code-intelligence-child-surface.md). (a) Communities: NO direct tool -> rung 2 compose via cypher over Community/MEMBER_OF (214 communities confirmed). (b) Flows/processes: NO direct tool; query has processes[] but NL-only (not from/to/name filterable) -> rung 2 compose via cypher over Process/STEP_IN_PROCESS (300 processes). (c) Upstream depth-2 callers: DIRECT via impact{direction:upstream,maxDepth:2,includeTests:true} -> rung 1/2, filter byDepth filePaths with isTestPath. SURPRISE: GitNexusProvider.graph() calls non-existent child tool 'call_graph' (Unknown tool error) -> code_graph broken on 1.6.7; backlog retarget to context/cypher. cypher returns markdown table not JSON rows.

tasks.title: SPIKE: embeddings population investigation
tasks.notes: LOCAL: 'npx gitnexus analyze --embeddings' populates embeddings via a local ONNX CPU model (Snowflake/snowflake-arctic-embed-xs, 384-dim, dist/mcp/core/embedder.js MODEL_ID); no API key. Verified end-to-end on a throwaway repo: embeddings 0 -> 3, vectorSearch flipped unavailable -> exact-scan active. Cost: one-time ~87MB HuggingFace model download (cached at ~/.cache/huggingface, offline after), then local CPU compute. Platform caveat: LadybugDB VECTOR index unavailable on win32 so semantic query uses exact-scan fallback (cap 10000 chunks) -- works, not a blocker. Embeddings are OFF by default and PRESERVED across plain analyze (only --drop-embeddings removes them). Optional EXTERNAL remote path exists via GITNEXUS_EMBEDDING_URL/_MODEL/_API_KEY env vars (opt-in, not required). T2.3 -> LOCAL branch: pass --embeddings in /pm index + VERIFY re-index. See docs/code-intelligence-embeddings.md.

tasks.title: P4b: kb_session_prime graph-neighbor expansion
tasks.notes: Expansion lives in src/tools/kb-session-prime.ts (design D4, one layer up -- SqliteProvider.prime/HttpKbProvider.prime untouched). After prime + global append, sweeps hint_symbols through getProvider().context({name}) (per T1.1 surface doc: incoming.calls[].name + outgoing.calls[].name; code_graph is broken on gitnexus 1.6.7 so context was chosen), collects neighbors not in hint_symbols capped at NEIGHBOR_CAP=10 (exported), runs ONE providers.project.query batch, appends deduped entries below direct hits marked via='graph-neighbor' capped at ADDED_ENTRY_CAP=5 (exported). Defensive: parseContextNeighbors treats isError/missing content/unparseable JSON/ambiguous-candidate responses as no neighbors; per-symbol try/catch; per-neighbor ftsSafeTerm quoted-token sanitizer so one FTS-hostile name degrades to skipping that neighbor (plan-review correctness note) not the batch; entire block hard-skip try/catch -> prime output unchanged on any failure; skipped when hint_symbols empty/absent. Tests: extended tests/knowledge/kb-session-prime.test.ts with 9 wrapper tests (vi.resetModules + dynamic import + vi.hoisted mocks per KB constraint 1) covering append+via+rank-below-direct, NEIGHBOR_CAP (11->10), ADDED_ENTRY_CAP (8->5), dedupe-by-id, graceful-skip (getProvider throws / context throws), hint_symbols absent, isError, FTS-hostile-neighbor-skipped. 13/13 pass, build clean. NOTE: pre-commit ASCII hook false-positives on backtick-n template literals -- used string concatenation in tests.
